sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68356" key="molpai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολπ-αῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tuneful</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀοιδάν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1355.tlg001:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erinn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
